title: astragalus vicinalis
intro: Astragalus vicinalis, also known as the Chinese milk vetch, is a plant species in the pea family Fabaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory effects, which can help the body adapt to stress and promote immune system balance. The plant contains saponins, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds that contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing immune function. Astragalus vicinalis can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as capsules, teas, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
